title: [SCFToCalyx] Fix crash when calling external functions (Fix #9529)
body:
The lower-scf-to-calyx pass would crash when encountering calls to external functions (functions declared but not defined). This commit fixes the issue by:

1. Skip external functions in FuncOpConversion - they have no body to lower to Calyx components.

2. Add proper error checking in BuildCallInstance - emit a clear error message when encountering calls to external functions instead of creating invalid instances.

3. Add null checks in BuildOpGroups - handle the case where no instance exists for a call operation.

4. Improve top-level function inference - only count non-external functions when inferring the top-level function, allowing modules with external function declarations to work correctly.

5. Skip external functions in FuncOpPartialLoweringPattern - they don't have component state to process.

Fixes #9529
